workbench.description: Linux workbench — exec shell commands, read/write files, run code in isolated containers

pipedream.description: Pipedream Connect — run actions across 2,000+ apps (Slack, Gmail, Notion, GitHub, Linear, HubSpot, etc.) on behalf of jaden-garza
